prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `12eac192`.
codex_response:
Implemented `task_12eac192` as an ARC2 package. The rule is: treat each same-color 4-connected non-background component independently, recolor size-`1` and size-`2` components to green `3`, and leave larger components unchanged. I used the `opus46` summary as the correct hint and discarded the row-boundary `sonnet45` hint; that mismatch is documented in [notes.md](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_12eac192/notes.md#L1). No new shared primitive was needed.

The verifier is in [verifier.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_12eac192/verifier.py#L4), the generator is in [generator.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_12eac192/generator.py#L184), and package wiring is in [__init__.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_12eac192/__init__.py#L1). The generator matches the family by explicitly placing weighted size-`1..5` motifs on a black-dominant background, allowing dense different-color contact while preventing accidental same-color merges.
